title: GEP Exploration & Prompts
description: Exploration loop, prompt construction, git operations, idle scheduling, and local state awareness for the GEP (Genome Evolution Protocol) system.

modules.name: explore
modules.note: Minified/obfuscated; internal function names are hex-encoded. Public API inferred from callers.
exported_functions: tryExplore(signals: string[], schedule: ScheduleRecommendation, repoRoot: string): Promise<{ signals: string[] }>
internal_helpers_inferred: isIgnoredPath(path): boolean -- skips node_modules, .git/, dist/, build/, .min.js, package-lock, .lock, .map
modules.behavior: Async exploration loop that scans repo source files, filters to code files, extracts content/signals, and returns discovered signals for the evolution cycle.

modules.name: prompt
modules.note: Minified/obfuscated. Public API inferred from test/prompt.test.js and callers.
modules.behavior: Constructs the LLM prompt string for a GEP evolution cycle. Embeds signals, selected gene, candidates, and protocol instructions. Output is consumed by solidify.js to drive the Claude LLM call.

modules.name: gitOps
exported_functions: runCmd(cmd: string, opts?: { cwd?: string, timeoutMs?: number }): string
tryRunCmd(cmd: string, opts?): { ok: boolean, out: string, err: string }
rollbackNewUntrackedFiles({ repoRoot, baselineUntracked }): { deleted: string[], skipped: string[], removedDirs: string[] }
constants: CRITICAL_PROTECTED_FILES: string[] -- MEMORY.md, SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, AGENTS.md, openclaw.json, .env, package.json, etc.
modules.behavior: All git CLI invocations are centralized here. Supports three rollback modes: 'hard' (git reset --hard), 'stash' (git stash push), 'none' (skip). Critical protected paths are never deleted during rollback.

modules.name: idleScheduler
modules.behavior: OMLS-inspired idle detector. Reads system idle time cross-platform and maps to intensity levels. Persists last check state. Controls whether the evolver runs distillation/reflection/exploration during idle windows.

modules.name: localStateAwareness
exported_functions: captureLocalState(): string -- full formatted state report
captureLocalStatePaths(): { nodeIdFile, nodeSecretFile, envFile, memoryDir, evolutionDir, skillsDir }
modules.behavior: Aggregates local node identity, environment config, evolution cycle state, memory/knowledge metrics, and installed skills into a formatted string report used as context for buildGepPrompt.

modules.name: signals
exported_functions: extractSignals({ recentSessionTranscript, todayLog, memorySnippet, userSnippet, recentEvents }): string[]
signal_extraction_layers: Layer 1: _extractRegex -- deterministic regex, 0ms, handles error sigs, language drift, tool bypass, feature requests (EN/ZH-CN/ZH-TW/JA)
Layer 2: _extractKeywordScore -- weighted keyword scoring with configurable thresholds (SIGNAL_PROFILES)
Layer 3: _extractLLM -- rate-limited (every 5 cycles), posts corpus to hub /a2a/signal/analyze via curl, returns semantic signals
post_processing: Signal prioritization: remove cosmetic signals when actionable ones exist
History-based deduplication: suppress signals appearing 3+ times in last 8 events
Empty cycle loop detection (4+ empty cycles → empty_cycle_loop_detected)
Saturation detection (5+ consecutive empty → force_steady_state + evolution_saturation)
Plateau detection from outcome scores (< 0.35 avg → plateau_pivot_required)
modules.behavior: Multi-strategy signal orchestrator. Merges regex + keyword score + LLM outputs, deduplicates against recent history, injects meta-signals for stagnation/saturation/failure loops.

key_relationships: index.js uses idleScheduler.getScheduleRecommendation() to get schedule
index.js calls explore.tryExplore([], schedule, repoRoot) when schedule.should_explore is true
solidify.js calls prompt.buildGepPrompt(opts) to generate the LLM evolution prompt
solidify.js calls gitOps.rollbackTracked() and gitOps.rollbackNewUntrackedFiles() on failure
localStateAwareness.captureLocalState() output injected into buildGepPrompt context
gitOps depends on paths.getRepoRoot() for cwd of all git commands
integration_flow: 2. If should_explore: explore.tryExplore(signals, schedule, repoRoot) → discovered signals
4. signals.extractSignals({ transcripts, logs, recentEvents }) → string[] of opportunity signals
6. prompt.buildGepPrompt({ signals, context, ...candidates }) → LLM prompt string
7. solidify.js executes Claude with prompt → gets mutation plan
important_notes: explore.js and prompt.js are obfuscated (JavaScript-obfuscator packing). Only public API inferred from callers and test files.
The 'buildGepPrompt' function constructs the full GENOME EVOLUTION PROTOCOL prompt including ethics/constitutional constraints.
gitOps never deletes MEMORY.md, SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, AGENTS.md or skills/ directories during rollback.
idleScheduler intensity 'deep' sets sleep_multiplier=0.25 (fastest cycle) and enables all action flags.
signals.js LLM layer (Layer 3) is rate-limited to once every 5 cycles and uses curl/execSync (not async fetch) to avoid event loop blocking.
explore.js result signals feed back into the next evolution cycle's signal set.
No formal class hierarchies -- all modules are CommonJS function-export style (module.exports = {...}).
